participants.name: Luke Altmyer
participants.notes: Threw 53 scripted passes; did not participate in athletic testing at pro day (already tested at Combine: 4.72 40, 32" vertical, 9'6" broad jump). Threw to Beatty, Arkin, and Laughery (Laughery is a returning junior, not a pro day participant). Attended Combine where he measured approximately 6-1, 215.

participants.name: Josh Gesky
participants.notes: Weighed in at just under 310 lbs, 25 lbs lighter than his playing weight of 335. 40 time reported as between 4.94-5.00 by scouts; best time 4.94. Measured 6-5 1/4, 321 at Shrine Bowl. Three-year starting guard. Houston Texans ran OL workout and met individually with Gesky. Also met with Saints and Ravens.

participants.name: James Thompson Jr.
participants.notes: Measured 6-6, 308. Ran close to 5.0 flat per scouts. 36 bench reps was most of any participant at the pro day. Showed impressive agility in DL/LB drills. Transfer from Wisconsin.

participants.name: Miles Scott
participants.notes: Listed at 5-11, 210. Posted 4.62 40-yard dash and 37.5-inch vertical. Team captain and multi-year starter at safety.

participants.name: J.C. Davis
participants.notes: Sat on his Combine 40 time (5.16 seconds). Completed 21 reps on bench and 7.85 three-cone at pro day. Attended Combine. Listed at 6-4/6-5, 322-335 depending on source. Transfer from New Mexico.

participants.name: Hank Beatty
participants.notes: Impressed in both the 40-yard dash and vertical jump per reports, but specific times not published. Bielema said he 'ran for a good time.' Also ran routes and caught passes from Altmyer. Return specialist. Third-team All-Big Ten. 70 catches, 864 yards in 2025. Approximately 5-11, 185.

participants.name: Tanner Arkin
participants.notes: Caught passes from Altmyer during throwing session. Listed at approximately 6-4 during college career. In-line blocking tight end. Specific drill results not reported.

participants.name: Melvin Priestly
participants.notes: Confirmed participant. Outgoing senior offensive tackle. Transfer from Grambling State. Specific drill results not reported.

participants.name: Josh Kreutz
participants.notes: Confirmed participant. Outgoing senior center. Said drills were 'stuff we've done before here.' Specific drill results not reported.

participants.name: Dylan Rosiek
participants.notes: Outgoing senior linebacker. Led team in total tackles in 2025. Specific drill results not reported.

participants.name: Torrie Cox Jr.
participants.notes: Outgoing senior cornerback. Listed at approximately 5-8, 165 on roster. Specific drill results not reported.

participants.name: Keelan Crimmins
participants.notes: Punter. Listed at 6-3, 230. Transfer from Purdue (previously Mississippi State). Originally from Spotswood, Australia (Prokick Australia). Averaged 44.0 yards per punt in 2025. Participated in punting drills. Specific athletic testing results not reported.

additional_notes: Illinois hosted its 2026 Pro Day on Thursday, March 12 at the Smith Center in Champaign. All 32 NFL teams sent representatives — a first during Bret Bielema's tenure. A total of 20 players competed per The Champaign Room (247Sports reported 'nearly 20'). NOTABLE ABSENCES: EDGE Gabe Jacas, a projected Day 2 pick who attended the Combine (only did bench press: 30 reps, measured 6-4, 260, 33" arms, 10" hands), did NOT participate and will hold a private workout in early April. J.C. Davis attended and participated in bench and 3-cone but sat on his Combine 40 time. Luke Altmyer only threw passes (53 total) and did not re-test athletically. Aidan Laughery (a returning junior RB) ran routes for Altmyer but was not a pro day participant. The full list of all 20 participants was not published in any available source — only the names above were specifically confirmed as participants across multiple reports. Several additional outgoing seniors (e.g., Leon Lowery, Dennis Briggs, Matthew Bailey, and others from the large senior class) may have participated but were not individually confirmed in the reporting available. Timing method (electronic vs. hand-timed) was not specified in any source; scout-reported times suggest mixed methods. The event was held indoors at Smith Center.
